scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace @huancai/api run build
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace @huancai/web run build
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --workspace @huancai/api run dev" "npm --workspace @huancai/web run dev"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace @huancai/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @huancai/web run typecheck
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace @huancai/api run dev
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace @huancai/web run dev
